name: smith machine bicep curl
instructions: Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level. Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart. Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary. Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps. Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps. Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

conditionNotes.note: Keep load symmetrical and stop at positions that create sharp pain or twisting.
Use pain-free range of motion, slower tempo, and lighter progressions when joints feel irritated.
Weight-bearing resistance exercises are beneficial for bone density when load is appropriate.
Maintain neutral spine and avoid positions that aggravate the lower back.
Maintain consistent breathing throughout. Avoid breath-holding.
Both aerobic and resistance training improve insulin sensitivity. Monitor blood sugar before, during, and after sessions. Have a fast-acting carb available.
Rhythm-based exercises and large-amplitude movements are beneficial. Focus on motor confidence.
Focus on muscle co-contraction and joint stability. Avoid locking out joints passively.
Functional patterns are generally safe. Prioritize pelvic floor awareness and avoid Valsalva.
Start light with higher reps and shorter ROM. Progress load gradually as pain-free capacity increases.
